Acrobat PDF/A - Portable Document Format (1a): Update to signature following error. Removal of whitespace causing issues in FIDO. Submitted by Vanderbilt University, Preservica and Misty De Méo.
Encapsulated PostScript File Format: Amended to allow for magic bytes to be Adobe-2 or Adobe-2.0. Submitted by The National Library of Australia.
Digital Negative Format (DNG): Changed maximum offset of 'TIFF header plus DNGVersion tag near EOF' from 4084 to 6000 bytes. Submitted by Digital Repository, Historic Environment Scotland.
Adobe InDesign Document CS: Outline description upgraded, note field updated and .indt file extension added. Submitted by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints.
Acrobat PDF 1.7 - Portable Document Format: Changed maximum byte offset from 0 to 1. Submitted by The National Library of Australia.
Adobe InDesign Document Generic: Outline description upgraded, note field updated and .indt file extension added. Submitted by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints.
MS-DOS Compression Format (SZDD Variant): Amended name for consistency, added link and description. Submitted by IS4.

MicroStation Base File: Added byte sequence to signature. Added priority over Bentley Microstation Hidden Line File. Submitted by Digital Preservation Department, The National Archives (UK).
HP TRIM Outlook Saved Message File: Added .mbx extension. Updated description. Submitted by National Archives of Australia and State Archives and Records Authority of New South Wales.

ESRI ArcInfo Grid .nit File: Capitalised 'File' in file format name and signature. Amended BOF signature to allow for 02, 04 or 08 at byte 2. Removed EOF signature. Submitted by Digital Preservation Department, The National Archives (UK).
